commit.message:
Address PR comments

1. Added a new class `HotSpotNumerics` that contains helper functions to
   determine signedness and width of types like `j[u]int`, `j[u]long`,
   and `[u]intn_t<N>`.

2. Added tests for left-shift range inference for int and long types,
   largely mimicking the tests for inferring the range for binary
   operators.
